milestones: solution.py exists and is valid Python (parses without syntax errors) containing the CollaborativeDesignSuite implementation
User registration and authentication system is implemented with classes/functions supporting account creation and login/logout functionality
A shared collaborative canvas is implemented that supports multiple simultaneous users and propagates real-time updates of design changes to all participants
Shape creation tools (for geometric shapes like rectangles, circles, etc.) and texture application tools are implemented and functional within the canvas
Element management features are implemented including alignment, grouping, and arranging/layering of design elements on the canvas
Dependency management is enforced in code such that operations require prerequisites (e.g., textures cannot be applied without existing shapes, annotations require an active collaboration canvas)
